name: Zorg Due Diligence
description: Research best practices for crafting puzzle-based adventures, CTFs, and ARGs.
objective: Produce a detailed reference guide for Zorg's puzzle design, ensuring a high-quality, immersive experience inspired by DEF CON and best-in-class puzzle games.
key_decisions: Use Exa-powered research for deep dives
Categorize by: Riddle Mechanics, Narrative Integration, Technical Puzzles, and Player Psychology
Final synthesis must include a 'What's Missing?' self-critique

workers.description: Research puzzle-based adventures (DEF CON, CTFs, ARGs, escape rooms). Focus on: riddle crafting, fair vs unfair puzzles, narrative gating, and immersion techniques.
Create a detailed taxonomy of puzzle types: codes/ciphers, file-system hunts, CLI challenges, and web-based puzzles. Map these to Zo capabilities.
Research player motivation and the 'Flow State' in puzzles. How to handle frustration, when to provide hints, and the role of 'Selection' in mystery narratives.
Synthesize all research into a Master Reference Guide. Perform a 'What's Missing?' self-critique. Ask: Is there anything I would add to Zorg after learning all this?
